ats_utilities.config_io.ini.inibase module¶

Module

inibase.py

Info

Defines class IniBase with attribute(s) and method(s). Loads the ATS configuration for the ATS.

class ats_utilities.config_io.ini.inibase.IniBase(info_file: str | None = None, ini2obj: IRead | None = None, obj2ini: IWrite | None = None, options_parser: IATSOptionParser | None = None, checker: IATSChecker | None = None, reporter: IATSReporter | None = None, file_checker: IFileCheck | None = None, strategy: IATSArgParseStrategy | None = None, verbose: bool = False)[source]¶

Bases: object

Defines class IniBase with attribute(s) and method(s). Loads the ATS configuration for the ATS. INI configuration-based API support.

It defines:

attributes:
ERRORS - Error checker mapping.
__checker - Error checker.
__reporter - ATSReporter for check operations.
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option.
__file_checker - FileCheck for checking file.
__ini2obj - In API for information.
__obj2ini - Out API for information.
__tool_operational - Control ATS operational functionality.
__option_parser - Option parser for ATS.
methods:
__init__ - Initials IniBase constructor.
is_tool_ok - Checks is tool operational.
ERRORS¶

alias of ErrorChecker

is_tool_ok() → bool[source]¶

Checks is tool operational.

Returns:

True (tool is operational) | False

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None

property option_parser: IATSOptionParser | None¶

Option parser for ATS.

Returns:

Option parser for ATS

Return type:

<Optional[IATSOptionParser]>

Exceptions:

None
